commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `text/vcard`/`.vcf` MIME mapping, allows `text/vcard` in host-read document loading, and adds MIME/web-media tests for valid and opaque `.vcf` files.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +18. Total +21 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main lacks `text/vcard` in the host-read allowlist, and `file-type@22.0.1` detects `BEGIN:VCARD` buffers as `text/vcard`, so the reported local `.vcf` path is blocked today. I did not run a live Telegram or delivery repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof, a security-boundary code fix or maintainer decision, and canonical-branch coordination rather than a safe automated repair marker.
